user.title: Connect to Navimow
user.description: Select your Navimow server region. You will be redirected to the Navimow login page in your browser.

auth.title: Authenticate with Navimow
auth.description: Please log in to your Segway/Ninebot account in the browser window that opened.

devices.title: Select Devices
devices.description: Select the Navimow mowers to add

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Confirm your region to re-authenticate via browser.

reauth_auth.title: Re-authenticate with Navimow
reauth_auth.description: Please log in to your Segway/Ninebot account in the browser window that opened.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Navimow service
error.no_devices: No Navimow devices found on this account

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Navimow service
abort.no_devices: No Navimow devices found on this account
